title: Release readiness E2E input v1
description: Shape consumed by --e2e-results. Produced by the playwright-to-readiness or junit-to-readiness adapters; can also be hand-emitted. Additional fields beyond those listed here are ignored.

status.description: Required. Overall result of the E2E suite.

total_count.description: Number of E2E specs executed (including skipped).

retries.description: Number of specs that retried (treated as flakiness signal). The engine penalizes retries>0 via the e2e_retries_or_flaky penalty.

failures.description: Failed specs. Title is matched against e2e_critical_name_patterns to decide critical vs. non-critical.

validations.description: Per-validation booleans. true → satisfied, false → explicitly failed.

critical_failures.description: Optional list of titles to treat as critical regardless of e2e_critical_name_patterns.
